## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for SEO Specialist role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Chad has extensive experience in technical SEO, web development, and agency work](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Discussion focused on AI's impact on SEO, content strategy, and measurement challenges](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [GrowthX aims to redefine knowledge work through innovative AI-driven processes](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Role involves systematizing SEO best practices and elevating service quality for clients](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)

## Topics

### Chad's Background and Experience

  - [Studied business management and professional writing in college](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Worked in University of New Mexico's IT department for 6 years](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [13-14 years ago, joined a startup web development and marketing agency in Denver](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Built up the SEO team to 5 people under his management](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Integrated SEO and growth concepts into website development projects](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Recently worked at Workshop Digital, a Richmond-based agency, for about a year](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### AI and SEO Innovations

  - [Discussed LLMS.txt files and potential A/B testing to measure effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Explored challenges in measuring AI traffic and prompt tracking](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Mentioned Cloudflare's LLM full feature for plain text content optimization](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Touched on cybersecurity concerns with AI tools like Claude](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)

### SEO Strategy and Best Practices

  - [Emphasized importance of site architecture, proper indexing, and sitemap optimization](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Recommended plugins like Google AMP for mobile speed optimization](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Stressed the value of keyword research and utilizing tools like SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [Suggested creating a standardized checklist for new client onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Highlighted the importance of setting clear KPIs and goals for each client](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Start with keyword research and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
  - [Consider business goals, target audience, and user personas](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Utilize heat mapping and user engagement data when available](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Ensure content represents the brand consistently across all touchpoints](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)

### GrowthX's Vision and Future

  - [Agency serves as a proof point for redefining knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Aims to improve efficiency in content creation and marketing processes](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Goals include developing more public products beyond services](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [Aspires to lead in innovating how people approach work in the AI era](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to sync with Andy regarding Chad's candidacy](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)
  - [GrowthX team to follow up with Chad about next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)
  - [Chad to consider how his experience aligns with GrowthX's innovative approach to SEO and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/rWDwMVzgbsiAQasxSsdJRPp8wnJ17X52?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
